## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Lint and types pass (`uv run ruff check`, `uv run basedpyright`)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` and the README if behaviour or config changed
- [ ] Regenerated `config.schema.json` (`uv run python -m nalanda schema`) if the config models changed
